packages.name: guzzlehttp/guzzle

suggest.ext-intl: Required for Internationalized Domain Name (IDN) support
suggest.psr/log: Required for using the Log middleware

packages.description: Guzzle is a PHP HTTP client library

packages.name: guzzlehttp/psr7
packages.description: PSR-7 message implementation that also provides common utility methods

packages.name: ipinfo/ipinfo
packages.description: The official PHP library for IPinfo, the most reliable, accurate, and in-depth source of IP address data available anywhere. We process terabytes of data to produce our custom IP geolocation, company, carrier and IP type data sets. Visit our developer docs at https://ipinfo.io/developers.

packages.name: psr/http-factory
packages.description: PSR-17: Common interfaces for PSR-7 HTTP message factories

packages.name: symfony/cache
packages.description: Provides extended PSR-6, PSR-16 (and tags) implementations

packages.name: symfony/deprecation-contracts
packages.description: A generic function and convention to trigger deprecation notices

packages.name: symfony/http-foundation
packages.description: Defines an object-oriented layer for the HTTP specification

packages.name: symfony/polyfill-mbstring
packages.description: Symfony polyfill for the Mbstring extension

packages.name: symfony/service-contracts
packages.description: Generic abstractions related to writing services

packages.name: symfony/var-exporter
packages.description: Allows exporting any serializable PHP data structure to plain PHP code
